prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Roasted Tomato & Miso Soup, Basil Oil  
Braised Lamb Shoulder with Thyme, Creamy Polenta, Charred Baby Leeks  
Warm Sticky-Date Pudding, Whiskey-Caramel Sauce, Vanilla Bean Ice Cream
